results.title: Singapore PM Wong, Turkish President Erdogan reaffirm warm, longstanding ties between both countries
results.description: SINGAPORE: Prime Minister Lawrence Wong and Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan reaffirmed the warm and longstanding relations between Singapore and Turkey during a meeting in Istanbul on Friday (June 19).

results.title: Israel will exact heavy price from Hezbollah: Netanyahu
results.description: Jerusalem, Jun 19 (IANS): Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu on Friday warned that Israel will not tolerate attacks on its soldiers or its territory, and will exact a “very heavy price’ from Hezbollah for killing four soldiers in Lebanon on Thursday.“I send heartfelt condolences to the families of the Commander of the Armored Corps 52nd [...] The post Israel will exact heavy price from Hezbollah: Netanyahu first appeared on Nagaland Post .

results.title: Extensive security arrangements in place for fair conduct of NEET-UG re-test in J&K
results.description: Srinagar, June 20 (SocialNews.XYZ) Extensive security arrangements have been made across J&K for the fair conduct of the NEET (UG) re-test scheduled on Sunday (June 21). Authorities have made extensive arrangements across Jammu and Kashmir,... The post Extensive security arrangements in place for fair conduct of NEET-UG re-test in J&K appeared first on Social News XYZ .

results.title: Italy’s top diplomat cancels US trip as Meloni slams Trump’s claim she ‘begged’ for photo with him
results.description: Rome, Jun 19 (AP): The Italian government on Friday slammed US President Donald Trump’s claim that Premier Giorgia Meloni had “begged” for a photo with him during the recent G7 summit, a pushback that suggested the longtime US ally had had enough of Trump’s boasting.Italian Foreign Minister Antonio Tajani abruptly cancelled a planned trip to [...] The post Italy’s top diplomat cancels US trip as Meloni slams Trump’s claim she ‘begged’ for photo with him first appeared on Nagaland Post .
